---
title: "parallelization"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`test/parallelization.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/parallelization.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `heavy_compute` {#heavy_compute}

```python
def heavy_compute(x)
```

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/test/parallelization.py#L5){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
